For salaries and expenses of the House of Representatives, $1,431,016,000, of which $25,000,000 shall remain available until September 30, 2027: Provided, That the amount made available under this heading shall be reduced by $25,000,000 on October 1, 2026
For an additional amount for ''House allowances and expenses'', $1,000,000
For salaries and expenses of the Committee on Appropriations of the House of Representatives, $25,000,000, to remain available until expended
For salaries and expenses of the Office of the Clerk, including not more than $25,000 for official representation and other expenses, $35,000,000
Office of the Sergeant at Arms

For salaries and expenses of the Office of the Sergeant at Arms, including the position of the House of Representatives Child Care Center, not to exceed $5,000 of which may be used for official representation expenses, $100,000,000
For salaries and expenses of the Office of Diversity and Inclusion, $5,000,000
Office of the Chief Administrative Officer

For salaries and expenses of the Office of the Inspector General, $6,000,000
For salaries and expenses of the Office of General Counsel, $2,000,000
For salaries and expenses of the Office of the Parliamentarian, including the preparing and revising of the precedents of the House, $2,500,000
